item.title: Ornith-1.0: Self-Scaffolding LLMs for Agentic Coding 摘要
item.description:
DeepReinforce released Ornith-1.0, an open-weight (MIT licensed) LLM family built on Gemma 4 and Qwen 3.5, with variants from 9B to 397B parameters. It achieves state-of-the-art coding benchmark performance among comparable open-source models. The model excels at agentic coding tasks, handling multiple tool calls proficiently. Simon Willison tested the 35B GGUF version via LM Studio and Pi, finding it capable of complex code navigation tasks like finding specific code sections in a Datasette checkout. The model also demonstrated creative abilities, generating a recognizable pelican image at 103 tokens/second.
标签: AI, LLM, open-source, coding, agent, Gemma, Qwen, model-release, local-LLM, benchmark

item.title: Pluralistic: Gemini is better than search because Google enshittified search (29 Jun 2026) 摘要
item.description:
Cory Doctorow argues that Google's AI search summaries (Gemini) are better than traditional search because Google deliberately enshittified its search results to maximize ad revenue, making the open web unusable. He traces how Google's shift from sending users to websites to keeping them inside its walled garden, combined with ad monopolization and ad-blocker suppression, degraded web quality. Users now prefer AI summaries to avoid spammy, ad-laden pages, but this further harms the web ecosystem. Doctorow contrasts this with Kagi, a paid search engine that uses Google's index but ranks results better, proving Google could improve search but chooses not to.
标签: google, gemini, ai, search, enshittification, kagi, advertising, monopoly, web, privacy

item.title: Count the number of Safari tabs 摘要
item.description:
A quick AppleScript one-liner counts open Safari tabs across all windows: `osascript -e 'tell application "Safari" to count tabs of every window'`. The author ran it and discovered 370 open tabs, highlighting a common habit of accumulating many browser tabs.
标签: AppleScript, Safari, browser tabs, productivity, TIL, macOS, terminal, scripting

item.title: [Sponsor] Day One Journal 摘要
item.description:
Day One introduces Daily Chat, an AI-powered guided reflection tool that helps users overcome the common struggle of starting a journal entry. By talking through their day, users can organize thoughts and transform them into structured journal entries. Early testers report that the feature makes capturing thoughts effortless and inspires creativity, changing how they approach daily journaling.
标签: journaling, AI, reflection, productivity, creativity, writing, Day One, Daily Chat, guided reflection, personal development
